subtitle: Senior AI Enablement & SDLC Lead -- Agentic AI Strategy | SDLC Modernization | Portfolio-Wide Enablement
summary_text: Senior technology and AI-enablement leader with a structured, repeatable methodology for evaluating, governing, and embedding AI in enterprise software practice. Currently consulting on AI architecture, automation, and implementation -- including a scoring rubric, capability taxonomy, and evaluation flow adopted by a national CX consulting firm to compare agentic and generative AI platforms across enterprise environments. Earlier: 14 years as the first CTO at Money Management International (a national 501(c)(3) financial services nonprofit, regulated across all 50 states + CFPB / HIPAA / PCI-DSS / CARD Act). At MMI: led full SDLC modernization through Agile transformation (SAFe-style 10-week to 2-week sprints; doubled development throughput; up to 20% YoY reduction in deployment timelines); built Enterprise PMO from scratch (25% improvement on $30-50M portfolio); deployed production ML via DataRobot in regulated credit decisions. 17 years before that as founder of DMLCo (full P&L; dozens of client engagements; long-term advisory relationships).

bullets: Designed an algorithmic AI architecture evaluation framework -- scoring rubric, capability taxonomy, evaluation flow -- adopted by a national CX consulting firm to compare agentic and generative AI platforms across enterprise environments with explicit treatment of governance, integration fit, vendor lock-in, and failure modes at scale.

Provide client-facing AI advisory on generative and agentic AI architectures, automation, and implementation; translate executive priorities into architectural trade-offs and concrete platform decisions; published thinking on AI adoption realities and the automation-vs-AI distinction.

Hands-on AI-assisted engineering daily with Claude and GitHub Copilot; running an LLM-assisted pipeline (career-ops-dml, Node.js / Claude API / Playwright / Go) extended alongside Claude Code as a working pair-programmer -- live working code, not theory.

Published "There's Vibes, and There's VIBES" on LinkedIn -- an explicit perspective on agentic vs. orchestrated AI workflows, automation-versus-AI distinction, and where the orchestration layer is and isn't yet ready for production agent control.

Directed enterprise technology for a national 501(c)(3) nonprofit -- under continuous regulatory scrutiny across all 50 states plus federal regulators including the CFPB, with HIPAA, PCI-DSS, and CARD Act overlays.

Led full SDLC modernization through Agile transformation (SAFe-style 10-week to 2-week sprints); doubled development throughput and reduced concept-to-deployment timelines by up to 20% YoY; embedded performance analytics into daily operations producing 10-20% sustained improvement across key IT metrics.

Built Enterprise PMO from scratch; consolidated cross-functional project governance across IT and non-IT functions; delivered 25% improvement in project budget and time adherence across a $30-50M annual portfolio.

Owned buyer-side vendor governance across the full vendor lifecycle: SoW authorship, vendor budget and burn-rate tracking, multi-year vendor relationships, and resource-leveling decisions across in-house, nearshore, and offshore teams.

Owned the data function end-to-end -- DBA / SQL Architect origin, enterprise data warehouse maturation, and production ML deployment via DataRobot for credit and servicing decisions in a regulated environment with model governance under audit conditions.

Led full enterprise contact center AI transformation -- intelligent routing, AI-assisted coaching and monitoring, integrated knowledge bots (human-in-the-loop AI throughout) -- with zero service disruption on day-one go-live.

Built and led a 35+ direct (75+ extended) technology team across data, infrastructure, software engineering, and global vendor partners; sustained highest retention and satisfaction in the enterprise across 14 years.

Stakeholder translation across 12+ executive and operations stakeholders; multi-factor prioritization model (ROI x user satisfaction x efficiency x cross-departmental equity); 4-5 board engagements per year over 8-year CTO tenure.

Founded and scaled a web development and IT consulting firm over 17 years with full P&L ownership -- $4-5M peak revenue, 12 employees at peak, dozens of long-term client relationships grown primarily through referral.
Architected and operated a proprietary commercial-grade CMS supporting dozens of production sites; direct client engagement across discovery, scope, architecture, build, and ongoing support.

projects.title: github.com/mknnmknn/about-mknn
projects.desc: Overview of public projects, with access to private repositories on request. Featured project: career-ops-dml -- a private fork of santifer/career-ops, customized into the LLM-assisted pipeline used daily in my job search. Working code extended alongside Claude Code (Node.js, Claude API, Playwright, Go) -- live agentic-adjacent practice, not just architectural advisory.

skills.items: Agentic AI, Generative AI, AI Architecture Evaluation, LLM Platforms, AI Governance, Reflexive AI Practice, Vendor Consolidation
Agile/SAFe, SDLC Modernization, Concept-to-Deployment Discipline, Throughput Measurement, ePMO Governance
SoW Authorship, Vendor Budget & Burn-Rate Tracking, Multi-Year Vendor Relationships, Build-Buy-Partner, Resource Leveling
Microsoft Azure, Azure DevOps, GitHub, CI/CD, Claude Code as Pair-Programmer
DataRobot (Production ML), Data Warehousing, Data Governance, SQL/T-SQL, Power BI, Tableau
PCI-DSS, HIPAA, CARD Act, CFPB, Multi-State Regulatory, GRC Programs
